title: Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Rajasthan

heroImage.alt: Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary, Rajasthan

overview.short: Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected wildlife area in eastern Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected wildlife area in eastern Rajasthan, India. Located in Sawai Madhopur district, covering approximately 103 km², it forms the southern buffer of the Ranthambore Tiger Reserve and supports a rich assemblage of dry deciduous flora and fauna.

topPlaces.name: Todra
topPlaces.description: Todra is a census town in Sawai Madhopur district in the Indian state of Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Chhan, Sawai Madhopur
topPlaces.description: Chhan is a village in the Sawai Madhopur district of Rajasthan, India. It is identified with Jhain (or Jhayin), which is mentioned in the Delhi Sultanate chronicles as an important town of 13th and 14th century India.

topPlaces.name: Capture of Jhain
topPlaces.description: The Capture of Jhain was a military expedition carried out by the Delhi Sultanate under Jalal-ud-din Khalji against the Kingdom of Ranthambore. It took place in the March of 1291 when the Delhi forces defeated the Ranthambore forces under Gurdan Saini and captured the city of Jhain.

items.note: Todra is a census town in Sawai Madhopur district in the Indian state of Rajasthan.

Chhan is a village in the Sawai Madhopur district of Rajasthan, India. It is identified with Jhain (or Jhayin), which is mentioned in the Delhi Sultanate chronicles as an important town of 13th and 14th century India.

The Capture of Jhain was a military expedition carried out by the Delhi Sultanate under Jalal-ud-din Khalji against the Kingdom of Ranthambore. It took place in the March of 1291 when the Delhi forces defeated the Ranthambore forces under Gurdan Saini and captured the city of Jhain.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kota Airport (97 km) and the nearest railway station is Kota Junction (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sawai Man Singh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Todra, Chhan, Sawai Madhopur, Capture of Jhain.
